header: Global employment services, designed for growth
subHeader: We offer a range of services to help you hire, manage, and scale your workforce worldwide.

services.title: Employer of record
services.subtitle: Hire, onboard, and manage global talent
services.description: Quickly expand your global workforce across 160+ countries without establishing a local entity. We become your local HR partner.

services.title: Immigration
services.subtitle: Secure work visas & permits
services.description: Support your workforce wherever they are with the right visas and work permits to work legally.

services.title: Payroll
services.subtitle: Simplify workforce payroll
services.description: Manage salaries, taxes, and benefits across borders with compliant, automated payroll solution.

services.title: Compliance
services.subtitle: Stay compliant wherever you operate
services.description: We manage local labor laws, tax regulations, and compliance risks so your business stays on track.
features: Local labor law and compliance teams
Expert local audit and tax teams

services.title: Contractor
services.subtitle: Access global talent with compliant contractor agreements
services.description: We handle contract signings and tax form collections seamlessly, ensuring compliance with local regulations.
features: Contract signing and tax form collections
Expert local audit and tax teams
